home.heroSubtitle: We are the architects of community growth, fusing digital innovation with human-centered support to empower children and stabilize families in need.
home.storiesSubtitle: Witness the tangible results of combining digital precision with radical compassion in community development.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Receive updates on community breakthroughs, child empowerment milestones, and new ways to provide direct support.
home.newsletterPrivacy: Join our network of compassionate digital alchemists. Your privacy is our priority.
home.fuelSubtitle: Your contribution directly powers our digital literacy programs and family stabilization efforts. Choose how you want to make a difference today.
home.volunteerSubtitle: Join our on-the-ground team or contribute your digital skills to help us scale our impact globally.

programs.heroBody: Bridging the gap between technological advancement and human necessity to create sustainable impact for the most vulnerable communities.
programs.noProjects: No programs or projects published yet.

impact.heroSubtitle: Every number represents a life transformed. Every story is proof that precision technology, wielded with radical empathy, creates lasting human change.
impact.alchemySubtitle: Real voices. Real change. The people behind the numbers — sharing how the Jade D'Val Foundation transformed their lives.
impact.analyticsSubtitle: We measure everything so you can trust that every dollar, every effort, is making a measurable difference.
impact.ctaSubtitle: Your contribution powers communities, transforms lives, and writes the next chapter of change. Every amount makes a difference.
impact.ctaDisclaimer: 100% of your donation goes directly to our programs. Secure payment. Tax receipt provided.
impact.detailContinueTitle: Be Part of the Next Story
impact.detailContinueSubtitle: Your donation helps us create more stories like this one. Every contribution — big or small — drives real change.

news.heroSubtitle: Stay informed with the latest updates from our programs, community milestones, and foundation news.

contact.title: Immediate Support.
contact.subtitle: Whether it's an emergency or a call for help, we're here to respond with precision and care.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

getInvolved.heroSubtitle: Whether you bring professional skills, corporate reach, or pure passion — there's a place for you in our mission.
getInvolved.ecosystemSubtitle: We build alliances that multiply impact. From grassroots volunteers to global corporations — everyone has a role in the Jade movement.
getInvolved.individualDesc: Bring your expertise, passion, and network to co-create projects that directly serve communities.
getInvolved.corporateDesc: Align your CSR goals with Jade's mission for measurable, verified community impact at scale.

donate.title: Every Dollar
donate.subtitle: Your generosity directly powers our digital literacy programs, family stabilisation efforts, and community development projects.

footer.tagline: Pioneering the future of humanitarian aid through precision technology and radical empathy.
